title: The semilinear wave equation on asymptotically euclidean manifolds
summary:
We consider the quadratically semilinear wave equation on R^d, d>=3, equipped
with a Riemannian metric. This metric is non-trapping and approaches the
Euclidean metric polynomially at infinity. Using Mourre estimates and the Kato
theory of smoothness, we obtain a Keel-Smith-Sogge type inequality for the
linear equation. Thanks to this estimate, we prove long time existence (d=3)
and global existence (d>3) for the nonlinear problem with small initial data.

title: Boundary estimates for positive solutions to second order elliptic   equations
summary:
Consider positive solutions to second order elliptic equations with
measurable coefficients in a bounded domain, which vanish on a portion of the
boundary. We give simple necessary and sufficient geometric conditions on the
domain, which guarantee the Hopf-Oleinik type estimates and the boundary
Lipschitz estimates for solutions. These conditions are sharp even for harmonic
functions.
